    Governance

    AI Access Contracts

    Comprehensive guide to AI Access Contracts — contract structure, lifecycle management, enforcement mechanisms, and real-world examples

    ​
    📋 AI Access Contracts

    ​
    Introduction

    AI Access Contracts are policy bundles that govern how applications, agents, and users interact with AI services. Unlike traditional API keys that only provide access, contracts encode complete governance policies including rate limits, content safety rules, cost controls, and audit requirements.

    ​
    What Are AI Access Contracts?

    ​
    Definition and Purpose

    An AI Access Contract is a declarative document that binds:
    • Identity: Who is accessing (user, application, agent)
    • Policies: What rules apply (rate limits, safety, cost)
    • Resources: Which AI services can be accessed
    • Conditions: When and where access is permitted

    ​
    Contract vs. Traditional API Keys

    AspectAPI KeyAI Access Contract
    ScopeBinary (access/no access)Granular policies
    Rate LimitsGlobal or nonePer-contract quotas
    Safety ControlsExternal/optionalBuilt-in enforcement
    Cost AttributionDifficultBuilt-in tracking
    Audit TrailBasic loggingComprehensive telemetry
    LifecycleManual rotationAutomated with expiry

    ​
    Benefits for Enterprise Governance

    1. Policy Consistency: Same contract applied across environments
    2. Self-Service: Developers request access through contracts
    3. Cost Control: Per-contract budgets prevent overruns
    4. Compliance: Built-in audit trails and policy enforcement
    5. Flexibility: Different contracts for different use cases

    ​
    Contract Structure and Schema

    ​
    Complete Contract Schema

    {
  "$schema": "https://citadel.ai/schemas/access-contract-v1.json",
  "contract": {
    "metadata": {
      "name": "string",
      "version": "string",
      "description": "string",
      "owner": "string",
      "createdAt": "ISO8601",
      "expiresAt": "ISO8601",
      "status": "active|suspended|revoked"
    },
    "identity": {
      "type": "user|service|agent",
      "principalId": "string",
      "tenantId": "string",
      "sponsor": "string (for agents)"
    },
    "access": {
      "environments": ["dev", "staging", "prod"],
      "services": ["azure-openai", "azure-ai-search"],
      "models": ["gpt-4", "gpt-35-turbo"],
      "regions": ["eastus", "westeurope"]
    },
    "policies": {
      "rateLimit": {
        "requestsPerMinute": 100,
        "requestsPerHour": 1000,
        "tokensPerDay": 1000000
      },
      "contentSafety": {
        "enabled": true,
        "severityThreshold": "medium",
        "blockedCategories": ["hate", "violence", "self-harm"],
        "promptShields": true
      },
      "dataHandling": {
        "piiDetection": true,
        "piiRedaction": true,
        "sensitivityLabels": ["Internal", "Public"],
        "dataResidency": "EU"
      },
      "costControl": {
        "dailyBudget": 100.00,
        "monthlyBudget": 2000.00,
        "alertThresholds": [50, 80, 95]
      }
    },
    "audit": {
      "logLevel": "standard|verbose",
      "retentionDays": 90,
      "includeRequestBody": false,
      "includeResponseBody": false,
      "exportTargets": ["log-analytics", "storage"]
    }
  }
}

    ​
    Contract Metadata

    FieldDescriptionExample
    nameHuman-readable identifierfinance-team-production
    versionSemantic version1.2.0
    ownerTeam or individual responsiblefinance-platform-team
    expiresAtContract expiration date2024-12-31T23:59:59Z
    statusCurrent contract stateactive

    ​
    Identity and Authentication

    {
  "identity": {
    "type": "service",
    "principalId": "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012",
    "tenantId": "contoso.onmicrosoft.com",
    "authentication": {
      "type": "managed-identity",
      "clientId": "87654321-4321-4321-4321-210987654321"
    }
  }
}

    ​
    Rate Limits and Quotas

    Flexible quota system: 
    {
  "policies": {
    "rateLimit": {
      "requestsPerSecond": 10,
      "requestsPerMinute": 100,
      "requestsPerHour": 1000,
      "requestsPerDay": 10000,
      "tokensPerMinute": 10000,
      "tokensPerDay": 1000000,
      "concurrentRequests": 5
    }
  }
}

    ​
    Content Safety Policies

    {
  "policies": {
    "contentSafety": {
      "enabled": true,
      "severityThreshold": "medium",
      "blockedCategories": [
        "hate",
        "sexual",
        "violence",
        "self-harm"
      ],
      "promptShields": {
        "enabled": true,
        "jailbreakDetection": true,
        "indirectAttackDetection": true
      },
      "customBlocklist": [
        "competitor-sensitive-term",
        "internal-code-name"
      ]
    }
  }
}

    ​
    Data Handling Requirements

    {
  "policies": {
    "dataHandling": {
      "piiDetection": true,
      "piiRedaction": "mask",
      "sensitivityLabels": ["Public", "Internal"],
      "dataResidency": "EU",
      "encryption": {
        "inTransit": true,
        "atRest": true,
        "customerManagedKey": true
      }
    }
  }
}

    ​
    Contract Lifecycle

    ​
    Creation and Approval Workflow

    ┌──────────────┐    ┌──────────────┐    ┌──────────────┐    ┌──────────────┐
│   Request    │ →  │   Review     │ →  │   Approve    │ →  │   Create     │
│              │    │              │    │              │    │              │
│ Developer    │    │ Platform     │    │ Platform     │    │ Contract     │
│ submits      │    │ Team reviews │    │ Lead         │    │ generated    │
│ contract     │    │ policies     │    │ approves     │    │ with ID      │
│ request      │    │              │    │              │    │              │
└──────────────┘    └──────────────┘    └──────────────┘    └──────┬───────┘
                                                                   │
                                                                   ▼
                                                          ┌──────────────┐
                                                          │   Deploy     │
                                                          │   to APIM    │
                                                          └──────────────┘

    ​
    Deployment to APIM

    Contracts are deployed as APIM products with associated policies: 
    <!-- APIM Policy enforcing contract terms -->
<policies>
  <inbound>
    <!-- Rate limiting from contract -->
    <rate-limit calls="1000" renewal-period="3600" />
    
    <!-- Token quota from contract -->
    <quota calls="10000" renewal-period="86400" />
    
    <!-- Content safety check -->
    <send-request mode="new" response-variable-name="safety-check">
      <set-url>{{content-safety-endpoint}}/text:analyze</set-url>
      <set-method>POST</set-method>
      <set-header name="Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key">
        <value>{{content-safety-key}}</value>
      </set-header>
    </send-request>
    
    <!-- Cost header injection for tracking -->
    <set-header name="x-contract-id">
      <value>{{contract-id}}</value>
    </set-header>
  </inbound>
</policies>

    ​
    Activation and Monitoring

    Once deployed:
    1. Activation: Contract status changes to active
    2. Key Distribution: API keys or credentials provided to requester
    3. Monitoring: Usage tracked against contract quotas
    4. Alerting: Notifications at threshold breaches

    ​
    Updates and Versioning

    Contract changes follow semantic versioning:
    Change TypeVersion ImpactExample
    PatchIncrease patch (1.0.0 → 1.0.1)Description update
    MinorIncrease minor (1.0.0 → 1.1.0)New optional policy
    MajorIncrease major (1.0.0 → 2.0.0)Breaking policy change

    ​
    Retirement and Revocation

    Contract Retirement Process:

1. Deprecation Notice (30 days before)
   ↓
2. Grace Period (existing requests honored)
   ↓
3. Suspension (no new requests)
   ↓
4. Revocation (all access blocked)
   ↓
5. Archive (logs retained, contract deleted)

    ​
    Contract Examples

    ​
    Example 1: Basic Developer Contract

    For development and testing: 
    {
  "contract": {
    "metadata": {
      "name": "developer-sandbox",
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "description": "Low-cost contract for development and testing",
      "owner": "developer@contoso.com",
      "expiresAt": "2024-06-30T00:00:00Z",
      "status": "active"
    },
    "identity": {
      "type": "user",
      "principalId": "user@contoso.com"
    },
    "access": {
      "environments": ["dev"],
      "services": ["azure-openai"],
      "models": ["gpt-35-turbo"]
    },
    "policies": {
      "rateLimit": {
        "requestsPerMinute": 10,
        "tokensPerDay": 50000
      },
      "contentSafety": {
        "enabled": true,
        "severityThreshold": "high"
      },
      "costControl": {
        "dailyBudget": 5.00,
        "monthlyBudget": 50.00
      }
    },
    "audit": {
      "logLevel": "standard",
      "retentionDays": 30
    }
  }
}

    ​
    Example 2: Production Workload Contract

    High-throughput production use: 
    {
  "contract": {
    "metadata": {
      "name": "customer-service-production",
      "version": "2.1.0",
      "description": "High-throughput contract for customer service chatbot",
      "owner": "customer-service-team",
      "expiresAt": "2025-12-31T00:00:00Z",
      "status": "active"
    },
    "identity": {
      "type": "service",
      "principalId": "service-principal-guid",
      "authentication": {
        "type": "managed-identity"
      }
    },
    "access": {
      "environments": ["prod"],
      "services": ["azure-openai", "azure-ai-search"],
      "models": ["gpt-4", "gpt-4-turbo", "text-embedding-ada-002"],
      "regions": ["eastus", "westeurope"]
    },
    "policies": {
      "rateLimit": {
        "requestsPerSecond": 50,
        "requestsPerMinute": 1000,
        "tokensPerMinute": 500000,
        "tokensPerDay": 50000000,
        "concurrentRequests": 20
      },
      "contentSafety": {
        "enabled": true,
        "severityThreshold": "medium",
        "blockedCategories": ["hate", "sexual", "violence", "self-harm"],
        "promptShields": {
          "enabled": true,
          "jailbreakDetection": true
        }
      },
      "dataHandling": {
        "piiDetection": true,
        "piiRedaction": "mask",
        "sensitivityLabels": ["Internal", "Confidential"]
      },
      "costControl": {
        "dailyBudget": 500.00,
        "monthlyBudget": 10000.00,
        "alertThresholds": [50, 75, 90, 95]
      }
    },
    "audit": {
      "logLevel": "verbose",
      "retentionDays": 365,
      "includeRequestBody": false,
      "exportTargets": ["log-analytics", "storage"]
    }
  }
}

    ​
    Example 3: Sensitive Data Contract

    Enhanced protection for PII and sensitive data: 
    {
  "contract": {
    "metadata": {
      "name": "hr-sensitive-data",
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "description": "Enhanced protection for HR data processing",
      "owner": "hr-platform-team",
      "expiresAt": "2024-12-31T00:00:00Z",
      "status": "active"
    },
    "identity": {
      "type": "service",
      "principalId": "hr-service-guid",
      "authentication": {
        "type": "certificate",
        "thumbprint": "abc123..."
      }
    },
    "access": {
      "environments": ["prod"],
      "services": ["azure-openai"],
      "models": ["gpt-4"],
      "regions": ["westeurope"]
    },
    "policies": {
      "rateLimit": {
        "requestsPerMinute": 50,
        "tokensPerDay": 1000000
      },
      "contentSafety": {
        "enabled": true,
        "severityThreshold": "low",
        "blockedCategories": ["hate", "sexual", "violence", "self-harm"],
        "promptShields": {
          "enabled": true,
          "jailbreakDetection": true,
          "indirectAttackDetection": true
        }
      },
      "dataHandling": {
        "piiDetection": true,
        "piiRedaction": "remove",
        "sensitivityLabels": ["Highly Confidential"],
        "dataResidency": "EU",
        "encryption": {
          "inTransit": true,
          "atRest": true,
          "customerManagedKey": true
        }
      },
      "costControl": {
        "dailyBudget": 100.00,
        "monthlyBudget": 2000.00
      }
    },
    "audit": {
      "logLevel": "verbose",
      "retentionDays": 2555,
      "includeRequestBody": true,
      "includeResponseBody": false,
      "exportTargets": ["log-analytics"]
    }
  }
}

    ​
    Example 4: Multi-Tenant Contract

    Isolated usage tracking for SaaS scenarios: 
    {
  "contract": {
    "metadata": {
      "name": "saas-tenant-{tenantId}",
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "description": "Isolated contract per SaaS tenant",
      "owner": "saas-platform-team",
      "template": true
    },
    "identity": {
      "type": "service",
      "principalId": "{tenantServicePrincipal}",
      "authentication": {
        "type": "managed-identity"
      }
    },
    "access": {
      "environments": ["prod"],
      "services": ["azure-openai"],
      "models": ["gpt-35-turbo", "text-embedding-ada-002"]
    },
    "policies": {
      "rateLimit": {
        "requestsPerMinute": 100,
        "tokensPerDay": 10000000
      },
      "contentSafety": {
        "enabled": true,
        "severityThreshold": "medium"
      },
      "costControl": {
        "dailyBudget": 50.00,
        "monthlyBudget": 1000.00,
        "tenantIsolation": true
      }
    },
    "audit": {
      "logLevel": "verbose",
      "retentionDays": 90,
      "tenantTagging": true
    }
  }
}

    ​
    Contract Enforcement Points

    ​
    APIM Policy Configuration

    Contracts map to APIM products with associated policies: 
    <policies>
  <inbound>
    <!-- Base policy: Authentication -->
    <base />
    
    <!-- Contract-specific rate limits -->
    <rate-limit-by-key 
      calls="{{contract.requestsPerHour}}"
      renewal-period="3600"
      counter-key="{{contract.id}}" />
    
    <!-- Token quota management -->
    <quota-by-key 
      calls="{{contract.tokensPerDay}}"
      renewal-period="86400"
      counter-key="{{contract.id}}" />
    
    <!-- Content safety integration -->
    <choose>
      <when condition="{{contract.contentSafetyEnabled}}">
        <send-request mode="new" response-variable-name="safety-result">
          <set-url>{{content-safety-endpoint}}/text:analyze</set-url>
          <set-method>POST</set-method>
        </send-request>
        <choose>
          <when condition="@(((IResponse)context.Variables["safety-result"]).StatusCode != 200)">
            <return-response>
              <set-status code="400" reason="Content Safety Violation" />
            </return-response>
          </when>
        </choose>
      </when>
    </choose>
    
    <!-- Cost tracking headers -->
    <set-header name="x-contract-id" exists-action="override">
      <value>{{contract.id}}</value>
    </set-header>
    <set-header name="x-cost-center" exists-action="override">
      <value>{{contract.costCenter}}</value>
    </set-header>
  </inbound>
</policies>

    ​
    Runtime Validation

    Gateway validates contracts on each request:
    1. Contract Exists: Valid contract ID in request
    2. Not Expired: Current date before expiresAt
    3. Status Active: Contract status is active
    4. Rate Limits: Current usage under quotas
    5. Content Safety: Request passes safety checks
    6. Budget Check: Current spend under budget

    ​
    Violation Handling

    Violation TypeResponseAction
    Rate Limit Exceeded429 Too Many RequestsLog, notify owner, queue for review
    Budget Exceeded403 ForbiddenBlock, alert finance team
    Content Safety400 Bad RequestLog, flag for review
    Contract Expired401 UnauthorizedPrompt renewal
    Invalid Authentication401 UnauthorizedLog security event

    ​
    JSON Schema for Contracts

    {
  "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
  "$id": "https://citadel.ai/schemas/access-contract-v1.json",
  "title": "AI Access Contract",
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["contract"],
  "properties": {
    "contract": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": ["metadata", "identity", "access", "policies"],
      "properties": {
        "metadata": {
          "type": "object",
          "properties": {
            "name": { "type": "string", "pattern": "^[a-z0-9-]+$" },
            "version": { "type": "string", "pattern": "^\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+$" },
            "description": { "type": "string" },
            "owner": { "type": "string" },
            "createdAt": { "type": "string", "format": "date-time" },
            "expiresAt": { "type": "string", "format": "date-time" },
            "status": { 
              "type": "string", 
              "enum": ["draft", "pending", "active", "suspended", "revoked"]
            }
          },
          "required": ["name", "version"]
        },
        "identity": {
          "type": "object",
          "properties": {
            "type": { "type": "string", "enum": ["user", "service", "agent"] },
            "principalId": { "type": "string", "format": "uuid" },
            "tenantId": { "type": "string" },
            "sponsor": { "type": "string" }
          },
          "required": ["type", "principalId"]
        },
        "access": {
          "type": "object",
          "properties": {
            "environments": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": { "type": "string", "enum": ["dev", "staging", "prod"] }
            },
            "services": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": { "type": "string" }
            },
            "models": {
              "type": "array",
              "items": { "type": "string" }
            }
          }
        },
        "policies": {
          "type": "object",
          "properties": {
            "rateLimit": {
              "type": "object",
              "properties": {
                "requestsPerSecond": { "type": "integer", "minimum": 1 },
                "requestsPerMinute": { "type": "integer", "minimum": 1 },
                "requestsPerHour": { "type": "integer", "minimum": 1 },
                "requestsPerDay": { "type": "integer", "minimum": 1 },
                "tokensPerMinute": { "type": "integer", "minimum": 1 },
                "tokensPerDay": { "type": "integer", "minimum": 1 }
              }
            },
            "contentSafety": {
              "type": "object",
              "properties": {
                "enabled": { "type": "boolean" },
                "severityThreshold": { 
                  "type": "string", 
                  "enum": ["low", "medium", "high"] 
                }
              }
            },
            "costControl": {
              "type": "object",
              "properties": {
                "dailyBudget": { "type": "number", "minimum": 0 },
                "monthlyBudget": { "type": "number", "minimum": 0 },
                "alertThresholds": {
                  "type": "array",
                  "items": { "type": "integer", "minimum": 1, "maximum": 100 }
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

    ​
    Contract Management Workflow

    ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        CONTRACT LIFECYCLE                                   │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                             │
│  ┌─────────┐   ┌─────────┐   ┌─────────┐   ┌─────────┐   ┌─────────┐       │
│  │  DRAFT  │ → │ PENDING │ → │ ACTIVE  │ → │SUSPENDED│ → │ REVOKED │       │
│  └─────────┘   └─────────┘   └─────────┘   └─────────┘   └─────────┘       │
│       ↑                           │              ↑              │          │
│       │                           │              │              │          │
│       │                           ▼              │              ▼          │
│       │                      ┌─────────┐         │         ┌─────────┐     │
│       │                      │ EXPIRED │─────────┘         │ARCHIVED │     │
│       │                      └─────────┘                   └─────────┘     │
│       │                                                                    │
│       └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    │
│                              (Update creates new version)                  │
│                                                                            │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

    ​
    Best Practices

    ​
    Contract Design

    1. Start Restrictive: Begin with lower limits, increase based on usage
    2. Environment Segregation: Separate contracts for dev/staging/prod
    3. Time-Bound: Set expiration to force periodic review
    4. Cost Controls: Always include budget limits with alerts
    5. Safety First: Enable content safety by default

    ​
    Contract Governance

    1. Naming Conventions: Use consistent patterns (team-environment-purpose)
    2. Version Control: Store contract definitions in Git
    3. Review Cadence: Quarterly access reviews for all contracts
    4. Automation: Automate deployment through CI/CD
    5. Monitoring: Dashboard for contract usage and violations

    ​
    Security Considerations

    1. Least Privilege: Minimum necessary permissions
    2. Credential Rotation: Automatic key rotation before expiry
    3. Audit Trail: Log all contract changes
    4. Approval Workflow: Multi-person approval for production
    5. Emergency Revocation: Ability to instantly revoke access

    ​

    • Learn about policy enforcement mechanisms
    • Understand identity management patterns
    • Review the Governance Hub architecture
